svg.title: What Maximilian Grohmann brings to clinical AI and medical informatics projects
svg.desc: A professional poster about medical imaging, radiotherapy automation, patient safety, DICOM workflows and clinical AI validation.

foreignObject.div: I connect clinical medical physics, department IT and pragmatic software engineering — turning complex radiotherapy and imaging workflows into safer, clearer and more reproducible systems.
DICOM, CT/MRI/PET, RTSTRUCT, dose grids and image geometry.
Clinical plan review, treatment data, QA and workflow automation.
Useful only when robust, reproducible, safe and clinically fit-for-purpose.
FAIR, decision-relevant data products from messy real-world systems.
Python, C#, ESAPI and tooling that removes avoidable friction.
Clinical AI does not become valuable from algorithms alone.
Value comes from connecting science, data quality, clinical workflow and validation.
My space: building clinical AI and imaging solutions that are credible, usable and impactful.

g.text: Because in healthcare, the question is not only:

foreignObject.div: “CAN WE TRUST IT, USE IT, AND MAKE BETTER DECISIONS BECAUSE OF IT?”

svg.text: Maximilian Grohmann · Medical Informatics · Radiotherapy Automation · Clinical AI · Patient Safety
